title: meliosma dumicola
intro: Meliosma dumicola, also known as the "Mountain Meliosma" or "Pahutan", is a species of flowering plant in the family Calycanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Meliosma dumicola is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical formulations.
